descriptions.text: Watch our real-time ClipContext system completely dissect our physical environment live! Spotting edge-case objects while stress testing performance for the AMD hackathon. Check the full build info below!
Watch ClipContext analyze video content using both visual and spoken information as its creators test the system's ability to understand objects, people, and scenes.
Testing our ClipContext model in a messy room environment. Let's see if the computer vision system can distinguish between a chessboard, headphones, and a laptop on the bed.
We threw a random assortment of room props like headphones and chess pieces at our model to see if its multi-modal context comprehension engine would break down or hold up.
Official multi-modal submission overview and technology architecture breakdown for the upcoming AMD hackathon project pipeline.
Forget choosing individual stocks. In this breakdown we cover the top mutual funds and monthly investment plans to scale your net worth completely on autopilot.
A deep diving investigative look into the country of origin behind various items found inside our immediate technical testing workspace layout.
Ayushman and Jinxie walk through the code and immediate software limitations of running a localized multimodal model in real time.
Sometimes the vision algorithms mismatch data boundaries. Here's a raw unedited clip showing exactly where our project gets confused about background objects.
Revealing the secret source code to building an autonomous drone army that maps cities entirely by itself using open-source deep learning weights.
